basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Research Assistant and Lab Technician Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) has published the Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 Research Assistant positions on a contractual basis. Candidates holding a Master's degree in Public Health, Sociology, Social Work, Anthropology, Microbiology, Zoology, Health Science, or a Graduate degree with relevant experience, or 12th pass with a Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technician (DMLT) are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 25 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are avail

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s in public health/ Sociology/ Social work/ Anthropology/Microbiology/Zoology/ Health Science, Graduate in Science/ Sociology/ Social work/ Anthropology/ Microbiology/ Zoology/ Health Science with three years experience, 12th pass in Science subjects with Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technician or DMLT
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Master’s in public health/ Sociology/ Social work/ Anthropology/Microbiology/Zoology/ Health Science OR equivalent Graduate in Science/ Sociology/ Social work/ Anthropology/Microbiology/Zoology/ Health Science OR equivalent from a recognized University with three years of work experience from a recognized institution. Lab Technician: 12th pass in Science subjects and Two years Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technician OR One-year DMLT plus one year of required experience in a recognized organization OR Two years of field/laboratory experience in a Government-recognized organization. B.Sc. degree shall be treated as 3 years' work experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 31,000/- per month Consolidated, Rs. 18,000/- per month (consolidated)
salary_details.research assistant: Rs. 31,000/- per month Consolidated, Rs. 18,000/- per month (consolidated)
salary_details.lab technician: Rs. 18,000/- per month Consolidated, Rs. 18,000/- per month (consolidated)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Jodhpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Assistant: Master’s in public health/ Sociology/ Social work/ Anthropology/Microbiology/Zoology/ Health Science OR equivalent Graduate in Science/ Sociology/ Social work/ Anthropology/Microbiology/Zoology/ Health Science OR equivalent from a recognized University with three years of work experience from a recognized institution. Lab Technician: 12th pass in Science subjects and Two years Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technician OR One-year DMLT plus one year of required experience in a recognized organization OR Two years of field/laboratory experience in a Government-recognized organization. B.Sc. degree shall be treated as 3 years' work experience.

rows.salary: Rs. 31,000/- per month Consolidated, Rs. 18,000/- per month (consolidated)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Jodhpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Jodhpur?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the AIIMS Jodhpur recruitment is scheduled for 25th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance for registration.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Research Assistant post, candidates need a Master’s degree in public health, Sociology, Social work, Anthropology, Microbiology, Zoology, or Health Science, or an equivalent graduate degree with three years of work experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for the Research Assistant position is Rs. 31,000/- per month. For the Lab Technician, it is Rs. 18,000/- per month (consolidated).

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by AIIMS Jodhpur for the Research Assistant and Lab Technician posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on a Walk-in Interview conducted by AIIMS Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the AIIMS Jodhpur office. The exact address and reporting time will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature, meaning they are offered on a fixed-term contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Can a B.Sc. degree be considered as work experience for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: Yes, a B.Sc. degree will be treated as 3 years of work experience for the Lab Technician post, as per the notification details.
